text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe I have upgraded my physical parameters
enough to handle the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
After we get back, I want to continue training just
as hard as I did here, if not harder.

And with that, my final summer camp with Mihono
Bourbon comes to a close.
